subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God, my Master, and my Ruler! Thou seest me a victim of every tribulation, a target for every shaft, and exposed to every spear
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و سیدی و مولائی ترانی موردا لکل بلاء و هدفا لکل سهام
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment
